name: Robert Townsend
abstract: Robert Townsend (born February 6, 1957) is an American actor, director, comedian, and writer. During the 1980s and early-1990s, Townsend gained national exposure through his stand-up comedy routines and appearances on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson.

concerts.label: CityKids Speak at Carnegie Hall... Voices from the Front Line

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: That’s The Meteor Man, yeah. That’s what I was trying to think of. Robert Townsend.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
